mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_name, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(200)) AS description FROM cb_app_role ORDER BY role_name

SELECT p.perm_id AS permission_id, p.role_id, o.object_id, p.action_name AS action FROM cb_permission p JOIN cb_protected_object o ON o.object_name = p.target_name WHERE p.role_id = #{roleId} AND o.object_id = #{objectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cb_permission_rule (rule_id, perm_id, rule_type, rule_value) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{permissionId}, #{ruleType}, #{ruleValue})
